content.question: What is the net fiscal cost or saving (including transportation, capital adjustment, governance transition, and maintenance costs) of closing a village primary school in the Hungarian context specifically, conditional on school and district size?
content.reduction_path: Commission a cost-accounting study of actual closure decisions in Hungary (2013-2024) comparing pre- and post-closure expenditure across local government, state, and household budgets, disaggregated by school enrollment size and district characteristics.
